text: 英語 聽力 模擬 視題
二十
第一節
聽下面五段對話
每段對話後有一個小題
從題中所給的
A, B, C 三個選項中
選出最佳選項
聽完每段對話後
你都有十秒鐘的時間
來回答有關小題
和閱讀下一小題
每段對話
盡讀一遍
現在
你有五秒鐘的時間
閱讀第一小題的有關內容
I heard you parked your car in the parking lot
near our company
How much is the monthly rent?
Last year, it was 231 per month
but it has gone up by 201 this year
Ugh, this week's weather is killing me
It's been foggy in the mornings
Tell me about it
The weatherman predicts sunny days this weekend
But says a typhoon is approaching next Monday
Helen, the printer is out of paper
I need to print some meeting materials
There's some paper in the storage room upstairs
I'll go and get a pack
Thanks
Lisa, this table looks old
We should do something about it
How about repainting it?
We can choose a bright color
Sounds nice
But I'm worried the paint won't stick well
We could sound the surface first
That would solve the problem
I'm going to tidy up my room
It's a mess
Could you give me a hand?
I'm afraid I can't
I'll help mom bake some cookies in the kitchen
After that, I'll go to Dylan's place to finish a school project with him
Just listen to every type of painting or poison
You're going to have time to read each small piece
Every small piece is five seconds
After listening, each small piece will take five seconds to make a time
Every type of painting or poison is two times
Listen to each piece of painting
Answered by six and seven two small pieces
Now, you have ten seconds to read these two questions.
Professor Lawn's classes are interesting, but all those historical events, schools and theories are driving me crazy.
I feel you. Take the Industrial Revolution, for example.
There's an endless list of terms and concepts to remember.
Yes, and it's not easy to remember the contributions of the figures like Shakespeare.
Maybe we can watch some historical documentaries or movies.
Sounds great. Reading historical novels might also help.

I feel you. Take the Industrial Revolution, for example.
There's an endless list of terms and concepts to remember.
Yes, and it's not easy to remember the contributions of the figures like Shakespeare.
Maybe we can watch some historical documentaries or movies.
Sounds great. Reading historical novels might also help.
Now, you have fifteen seconds to read these three questions.
Lily, do you have any plans after work today?
Well, it'll be the Lantern Festival tomorrow, so I'll drop by the supermarket near our company to buy you and Shell.
I remember you bought a bag of that last weekend.
Yes, but that bag of you and Shell has already been eaten up by my daughter.
She has eaten you and Shell every morning in the past few days.
She has a sweet tooth and loves you and Shell filled with strawberry jam.
This time, I'll get some with peanut butter for my husband and blueberry jam for myself.
You know, I've been in China for half a year or so, but I've never had you on Shell.
Is it really that good? I heard it can be boiled, fried, or steamed.
Each way gives it a different flavor.
Yup, but we eat you and Shell not just because it's delicious.
The round shape of you and Shell symbolizes family togetherness.
We believe that eating you and Shell may bring the family harmony, happiness, and luck in the new year.

Each way gives it a different flavor.
Yep, but we eat you and Shell not just because it's delicious.
The round shape of you and Shell symbolizes family togetherness.

Excuse me. How much are these t-shirts?
$20 each. I would like to buy some for my niece, my twin nephews, and my son.
What size do you want? A medium size for my niece and three small ones for the boys.
Okay, what designs do you want?
Well, my son would definitely want this blue quality shirt, and my niece likes red
and is crazy about kangaroos, and I will choose these white dinosaur t-shirts for the twins.
Good choices. Do you have a membership card of our store?
You can have these at 10% off the regular price if you have it.
Oh, I'm just a tourist here. I came to Australia mainly for a business conference.
Excuse me. How much are these t-shirts?
$20 each. I would like to buy some for my niece, my twin nephews, and my son.
What size do you want? A medium size for my niece, and three small ones for the boys.
Okay, what designs do you want?
Well, my son would definitely want this blue quality shirt,
and my niece likes red and is crazy about kangaroos, and I will choose these white dinosaur t-shirts
for the twins. Good choices. Do you have a membership card of our store?
You can have these at 10% off the regular price if you have it.
Oh, I'm just a tourist here. I came to Australia mainly for a business conference.
I heard you're considering moving out of your parents' place. Yes, my parents and I have a great relationship.
They've been incredibly supportive. However, I feel like it's time to stand on my own two feet.
I want to be responsible for all aspects of my life, from paying the bills to making my own decisions
about daily routines. That's a really mature way of thinking. So, what kind of place are you looking for?
You know, I'm now illustrating a children's book, so a place with plenty of natural light would be good.
I can enjoy the sunlight while I bury myself in my creative world.
That makes sense. Anything else?
I've been trying to get into the habit of cooking more healthy meals for myself,
so a place with a big kitchen would be a must.
I see. I can help you look through a list of houses to rent online.
That would be great. Thanks a lot.

Yes, my parents and I have a great relationship. They've been incredibly supportive. However,
I feel like it's time to stand on my own two feet. I want to be responsible for all aspects of my
life, from paying the bills to making my own decisions about daily routines.
That's a really mature way of thinking. So, what kind of place are you looking for?
You know, I'm now illustrating a children's book, so a place with plenty of natural light would be
good. I can enjoy the sunlight while I bury myself in my creative world.
That makes sense. Anything else?

That would be great. Thanks a lot.
Are you a fan of reading but trying to save some money?
The internet has tons of free books available and I'll introduce three good sites to find them.
Let's start our journey with Project Gutenberg, one of the oldest and most respected free book
websites out there. Founded in 1971, this website offers over 60,000 free ebooks and is a gold
mine for classic literature. Next up is Internet Archive Founded in 1996.
For book lovers, it's a treasure chest waiting to be opened.
It has rare and out-of-print books you might not find elsewhere.
It even has old magazines and comics. If you're a student or someone looking to learn new skills,
Book Boone, founded in 1988, is a website you'll want to try.
This site focuses on providing free textbooks and educational materials.
Here are three final tips to help you get the best out of these free book sites.
Try different sites. Don't stick to just one website.
Mix them up to find a perfect book for you.
Support your favorite authors. If you find a free book by a modern author that you really like,
think about buying their other books or writing a review to help them out.
Check back often. Many of these websites update their selections regularly.
Make it a habit to visit them to see what's new. Remember, you don't have to spend a lot to
enjoy reading. Jump in, explore, and let your passion for reading grow without spending much.
